questions.question: Which Indian airline recently inducted India’s first Airbus A350 aircraft into its fleet?
questions.explanation: Air India, the former national carrier now owned by India’s largest conglomerate Tata Group, has become the first Indian airline to incorporate an Airbus A350 aircraft. The technologically advanced wide-body plane landed in India on 24th December, heralding Air India’s plans to connect India with more long haul international routes.

questions.question: Which strait, that was recently in news, is also known as Gate of Tears in Arabic?
questions.explanation: The Bab el-Mandeb, a narrow strait, has become a strategic chokepoint due to Houthi attacks on tankers passing through the Red Sea, escalating the conflict and impacting global shipping. Bab-el-Mandeb Strait is also known as Gate of Tears in Arabic. It connects the Mediterranean Sea and the Indian Ocean via the Red Sea and the Suez Canal. It separates Africa from the Arabian Peninsula.

questions.question: According to Wildlife Protection Society of India (WPSI), which state led in tiger deaths in 2023?
questions.explanation: According to Wildlife Protection Society of India (WPSI), India lost a record 204 tigers from January 1 to December 25, 2023. This is said to be the highest tiger mortality in a decade. Within India, Maharashtra topped the list with 52 tiger deaths this year, followed by Madhya Pradesh with 45 deaths. The reasons ranged from natural causes, infighting between tigers, poaching, road/train accidents etc. The high mortality is worrying for India which has been touted as one of the bright spots in tiger conservation globally. The tiger population had grown from 2,967 in 2018 to 3,167 in 2022 across India.

questions.question: The recently launched My iGOT and VIKAS are related to which Government initiative?
questions.explanation: Mission Karmayogi, the government’s capacity building scheme for civil servants was extended with new features. Union Minister Dr Jitendra Singh launched My iGOT, Blended Programs and Curated Programs on the digital iGOT Karmayogi platform. My iGOT provides targeted courses matching individual and organizational needs. Blended Programs integrate offline and online learning components. VIKAS is a blended course on developing functional, behavioral and technological competencies among mid-level civil servants. The extensions aim to groom civil servants to be more innovative, progressive and technology-enabled.

questions.question: Who has been nominated by the President as the new Executive Chairperson of NALSA recently?
questions.explanation: President Droupadi Murmu has nominated Justice Sanjiv Khanna of the Supreme Court as the new Executive Chairperson of the National Legal Services Authority (NALSA). As per convention, the second senior-most judge of the Supreme Court occupies this post tasked with providing free legal services to the poor and marginalized. Justice Khanna, the apex court’s senior-most puisne judge, takes over from Justice Sanjay Kishan Kaul who demitted office on December 25 upon retirement.

questions.question: Which newspaper was established by Pt. Madan Mohan Malaviya, whose birth anniversary was observed recently on December 25?
questions.explanation: Madan Mohan Malaviya (1861–1946) was an Indian scholar, educational reformer, and politician, significant in the independence movement. He was a four-time president of the Indian National Congress and founded the Akhil Bharat Hindu Mahasabha. Known as Pandit and Mahamana, Malaviya co-founded Banaras Hindu University (BHU) in 1916, Asia’s largest residential university. He served as BHU’s vice chancellor from 1919 to 1938. A founder of The Bharat Scouts and Guides, he also established The Leader newspaper in 1919 and chaired Hindustan Times (1924-1946). He launched Hindustan Dainik in 1936. Malaviya received the Bharat Ratna posthumously in 2014.

questions.question: Styangkung village shrine of Islamic preacher Akhone Muhammad Shareef is located in which state or UT?
questions.explanation: Styangkung village shrine of Islamic preacher Akhone Muhammad Shareef in Ladakh has been included in sustainable development programme by Kargil Development Authority for preservation as a heritage site. Shareef and his descendants contributed immensely to the culture and history of Purig region. Restoration of his shrine will boost village development.

questions.question: Dean Elgar, who recently announced his retirement from International Cricket, is the former captain of which team?
questions.explanation: Dean Elgar is the former captain of South Africa. He has announced his retirement from international cricket after a test series against India concludes early January 2024.

questions.question: Recently, who has become the first world leader to reach two crore subscribers on his official YouTube channel?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has become the first world leader to reach two crore subscribers on his official YouTube channel. The second most followed global leader is former Brazilian President Jair Bolsonora, who has just 64 lakh subscribers.

questions.question: Nandankanan Zoological Park, that was recently making news, is located in which state?
questions.explanation: The Central Zoo Authority (CZA) has approved the transfer of a cheetah, African lion, and Chimpanzee from Dubai Safari Park to Nandankanan Zoological Park (NZP) in Odisha. The NZP, in exchange, will provide various animals including Hippopotamus, blackbuck, hog deer, gaur, red junglefowl, and gharial.
